info.title: dry-gen
info.description: A dotnet tool to generate other representations of a piece of knowlege from one representation.

commands.name: csharp-from-json-schema
commands.description: Generate C# classes from a json schema, using [NJsonSchema](https://github.com/RicoSuter/NJsonSchema).

options.name: --options-file
options.description: Read options from this file.

options.name: --output-template
options.description: Template text for controlling the final output. Use ${DryGenOutput} to include the generated representation in the result

options.name: --output-file
options.description: Write the generated representation to this file.

options.name: --replace-token-in-output-file
options.description: Replace this token in the output file with the generated representation instead of just writing the generated representation to the specified output file.

options.name: --input-file
options.description: Full path to the input file to generate a new representation for.

options.name: --schema-file-format
options.description: What format should be used when reading the schema file? 'ByExtension' (default) treats files with extension 'yaml' or 'yml' as yaml, others as json. Use 'Yaml' or 'Json' to force the format explicitly.

options.name: --root-classname
options.description: The classname for the class representing the schema it self. Default is the schema title, or 'ClassFromJsonSchema' if the schema has no title.

options.name: --title
options.description: Diagram title.

options.name: --namespace
options.description: The namespace for the generated c# classes (default: 'CSharpFromJsonSchema').

options.name: --array-type
options.description: The generic array .NET type (default: 'ICollection').

options.name: --array-instance-type
options.description: The generic array .NET type which is used for ArrayType instances (default: 'Collection').

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: mermaid-c4component-diagram-from-dotnet-deps-json
commands.description: Generate a Mermaid C4 Component diagram from a .Net deps.json file.

options.name: --options-file
options.description: Read options from this file.

options.name: --output-template
options.description: Template text for controlling the final output. Use ${DryGenOutput} to include the generated representation in the result

options.name: --output-file
options.description: Write the generated representation to this file.

options.name: --replace-token-in-output-file
options.description: Replace this token in the output file with the generated representation instead of just writing the generated representation to the specified output file.

options.name: --input-file
options.description: Full path to the input file to generate a new representation for.

options.name: --relation-level
options.description: What types of dependencies should be included as relations in the diagram? (Default: all)

options.name: --boundary-level
options.description: What kind of 'Container Boundary' should be included in the diagram based on the assembly names? (Default: all)

options.name: --exclude-version
options.description: Should version information be excluded from the diagram? (Default: false)

options.name: --exclude-techn
options.description: Should techn (technonlogy information) be excluded from the diagram? (Default: false)

options.name: --title
options.description: Diagram title. (Default is composed from main assembly and .Net runtime information)

options.name: --shape-in-row
options.description: Value for the parameter $c4ShapeInRow in UpdateLayoutConfig, used to arrange the diagram layout. (Default: 4)

options.name: --boundary-in-row
options.description: Value for the parameter $c4BoundaryInRow in UpdateLayoutConfig, used to arrange the diagram layout. (Default: 2)

options.name: --include-assemblynames
options.description: A '; separated' list of regular expressions for name of assemblies to include as components. (Default: all)

options.name: --exclude-assemblynames
options.description: A '; separated' list of regular expressions for names of assemblies to exclude. (Default: none)

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: mermaid-class-diagram-from-csharp
commands.description: Generate a Mermaid Class diagram from a C# assembly using reflection.

options.name: --options-file
options.description: Read options from this file.

options.name: --output-template
options.description: Template text for controlling the final output. Use ${DryGenOutput} to include the generated representation in the result

options.name: --output-file
options.description: Write the generated representation to this file.

options.name: --replace-token-in-output-file
options.description: Replace this token in the output file with the generated representation instead of just writing the generated representation to the specified output file.

options.name: --input-file
options.description: Full path to the input file to generate a new representation for.

options.name: --include-namespaces
options.description: A list of regular expressions for namespaces to include.

options.name: --include-typenames
options.description: A '; separated' list of regular expressions for type names to include.

options.name: --exclude-typenames
options.description: A '; separated' list of regular expressions for type names to exclude.

options.name: --exclude-propertynames
options.description: A '; separated' list of regular expressions for property names to exclude from each type.

options.name: --name-replace-from
options.description: A string to replace in all class/entity names.

options.name: --name-replace-to
options.description: The string to replace with in all class/entity names.

options.name: --tree-shaking-roots
options.description: A '; separated' list of regular expressions for types to keep as roots when tree shaking the resulting diagram.

options.name: --title
options.description: Diagram title.

options.name: --attribute-level
options.description: What visibility must an attribute have to be included in the diagram?

options.name: --method-level
options.description: What visibility must a method have to be included in the diagram?

options.name: --direction
options.description: In what direction should the diagram be generated?

options.name: --exclude-static-attributes
options.description: Should static attributes be excluded from the diagram?

options.name: --exclude-static-methods
options.description: Should static methods be excluded from the diagram?

options.name: --exclude-method-params
options.description: Should method params be excluded from the diagram? (Replaced by count)

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: verbs-from-options-file
commands.description: Execute several verbs in one run. You specify each verb in a separate yaml document in the --options-file. The yaml documents should be separated by --- (three hyphes) on its own line in the file.
